title: Reports from Other Continents
excerpt: A public media installation for Le Guess Who? 2021, bringing thirty global reports to the streets of Utrecht.
description: For Le Guess Who? 2021, I created — together with Roel Weerdenburg — a public media installation presenting thirty reports from all over the world to the shopping public of the city of Utrecht.
credits: With Roel Weerdenburg. Le Guess Who? 2021.
